notes: Rebaselined after Wave-1 plan execution. Changes from the previous Wave-4 baseline: PEAK_TORQUE_NM 480→340 (2026 ICE spec, MGU-H removal), WHEELBASE 3.38→3.40 (FIA 2026 max), LAP_DEPLOY_CAP_MJ 9.0→8.5 (deploy ≠ recovery), Overtake Mode P(v) profile (7100−20v with proximity gate), fuel-flow flat 3000 MJ/h (dropped 2014-era RPM ramp), engine wheel-geometry SSOT (was hardcoded 1.525m track). The 0-100 increase from 3.68→4.47s reflects the realistic ICE peak torque drop; lat-g shifts are second-order downstream effects of the new wheel geometry and the wheel-position fix near the track-edge contact patches.
